entry.title: New: Bill 68, CD1, FD1 (2024) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE TO CHANGE ZONING FROM M-2 HEAVY INDUSTRIAL DISTRICT TO B-3 CENTRAL BUSINESS DISTRICT (CONDITIONAL ZONING) FOR 33.764 ACRES IN KAHULUI, MAUI, HAWAIʻI, IDENTIFIED AS TAX MAP KEYS (2) 3-7-002:020, (2) 3-7-002:021, (2) 3-7-002:023, (2) 3-7-002:025, AND (2) 3-7-002:027 (QUEEN KAʻAHUMANU CENTER)"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
